item.mutantmonsters.creeper_minion_track: An item used to tame Creeper Minions hatched from Creeper Minion Eggs. Can also be used to view as well as alter the tamed Creeper Minion's properties.
item.mutantmonsters.creeper_shard.descri: A toxic weapon that causes explosions when used on terrain. Obtained by destroying a Creeper Minion Egg. Also used in brewing Chemical X.
item.mutantmonsters.endersoul_hand.descr: A weapon that has the user gain teleportation and block manipulation powers from Mutant Endermen. Obtained by right-clicking Endersoul Fragments from dying Mutant Endermen and dropping an Eye of Ender on them. Also used in brewing Chemical X.
item.mutantmonsters.hulk_hammer.descript: A mighty weapon that slams the ground, knocking back enemies. Also used in brewing Chemical X.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_arms: An articulated collage of bones reassembled from the remains of the Mutant Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Skeleton armor.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_limb: A remnant component of the Mutant Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Skeleton armor.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_pelv: A remnant component of the Mutant Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Skeleton armor.
A remnant component of the Mutant Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Skeleton armor.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_rib_: An articulated collage of bones reassembled from the remains of the Mutant Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Skeleton armor.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_shou: A remnant component of the Mutant Skeleton, used in assembling Mutant Skeleton armor.
block.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_sku: The skull of a Mutant Skeleton. Can either be worn as a helmet or placed as decoration. Also used in brewing Chemical X.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_ches: A powerful armor piece that consists of the bones of a Mutant Skeleton.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_legg: A powerful armor piece that consists of the bones of a Mutant Skeleton. Grants Speed II when worn.
item.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton_boot: A powerful armor piece that consists of the bones of a Mutant Skeleton. Grants Jump Boost II when worn.
entity.mutantmonsters.spider_pig.descrip: A neutral player-made mob that is an abominable amalgamation between a pig and a spider, created by feeding pigs a fermented spider eye before splashing them in Chemical X. Tamable by having them hunt down a pet Creeper Minion and can be saddled up for transport.
A passive player-made mob that lobs blocks of ice on hostile mobs. Created by splashing Chemical X onto a Snow Golem.
entity.mutantmonsters.mutant_zombie.desc: A hulking hostile mob that spawns rarely in the Overworld or is created by splashing Chemical X on a Zombie. It creates shockwaves, calls reinforcements and sends its targets up in the air before slamming them back down on the ground. Must be knocked down three times before it vanishes permanently. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Zombie.
entity.mutantmonsters.mutant_enderman.de: An eldritch hostile mob that spawns rarely in the Overworld or End Islands or is created by splashing Chemical X on an Enderman. It teleports, lobs blocks of grass, afflicts the target with blindness, lets out a disorienting roar that dishes out significant damage to surrounding mobs and splits in to numerous spectral copies of itself. Dies spectacularly in an eruption of Endersoul Fragments that pulls nearby entities inward. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Enderman.
entity.mutantmonsters.mutant_creeper.des: A volatile hostile mob that spawns rarely in the Overworld or is created by splashing Chemical X on a Creeper. It leaps in the air landing with an explosion, births a brood of expendable Creeper Minions to aid it and sometimes pauses to heal, which has a chance of supercharging it, to which all its abilities will be amplified. It heals from explosions and goes out in one big boom, pulling in nearby entities before doing so. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Creeper.
entity.mutantmonsters.mutant_skeleton.de: A hardy yet brittle hostile mob that spawns rarely in the Overworld or is created by splashing Chemical X on a Skeleton. It fires arrows that apply random debuffs, knocks away targets in close range and sometimes leaps into the air before unleashing a volley of arrows. It erupts into several components of itself upon death. Serves as the mini-boss counterpart of the Skeleton.
entity.mutantmonsters.creeper_minion.des: A newborn Creeper summoned by the Mutant Creeper in battle or hatched from a Creeper Minion Egg, tamable by players by being right-clicked on with a Creeper Minion Tracker. Can be fed TNT to boost its blast radius or gunpowder to boost its health. Is sacrificed to Spider-Pigs in order to tame them.
effect.mutantmonsters.chemical_x.desc: When applied to various mobs, the effect ends in a somewhat violent transformation into a mutated beast version of their former selves.
